import os

@app.get("/v1")
def handler_one():
    # Violation: feature flag check via inline environment lookup
    if os.getenv("ENABLE_NEW_V1") == "true":
        return "New V1"
    return "Old V1"

@app.get("/v2")
def handler_two():
    if os.getenv("ENABLE_NEW_V1") == "true":
        return "New V2"
    return "Old V2"
